paper_title: Demographic History and Molecular Dating Analysis of Anodonta anatina

methods.description: Compilation of biogeographic scenarios based on phylogenetic studies and COI gene sequences to model demographic history of Anodonta anatina.

steps.description: Biogeographic scenarios were compiled on the basis of phylogenetic studies of the freshwater mussel genus Anodonta.
steps.searchable_summary: compile biogeographic scenarios from phylogenetic studies

steps.description: Our COI sequence data for A. anatina from the rivers of the Azov-Prikubanskaya Lowland indicated the presence of a separate subclade within this species.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze COI sequence data to identify subclades

methods.description: Simulation of demographic scenarios using an Approximate Bayesian Computation (ABC) approach with DIYABC software to compare biogeographic scenarios.

steps.description: These demographic scenarios were simulated for comparison using an ABC approach with DIYABC v. 2.1.0 software.
steps.searchable_summary: simulate demographic scenarios using ABC with DIYABC

steps.description: A total of 3 × 10^6 simulated datasets were calculated.
Pre-evaluations of model prior combinations in ABC inference revealed that the prior settings were correctly assigned.
steps.searchable_summary: validate model prior combinations in ABC inference

steps.description: Posterior probabilities of the three biogeographical scenarios were calculated using direct and logistic approaches.
Times of divergence between lineages in a supported scenario were calculated using estimation of posterior distributions of parameters with DIYABC v. 2.1.0.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate times of divergence using posterior distributions

methods.description: Calculation of population genetic diversity indices and statistical tests to estimate the demographic histories of sampled populations using Arlequin software.

steps.description: Population genetic diversity indices (haplotype and nucleotide diversity), Tajima's D test, and Fu's F-test statistics, and mismatch distribution analysis under a spatial expansion model were calculated using Arlequin v. 3.5.1.2 software.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate genetic diversity indices and perform statistical tests using Arlequin
